name: South Park (Open World RPG)
description:
Just another day in the quirky town of South Park! There's adventures to be had and perhaps even a bit of romance as well. What kind of wacky adventures will you go on with the loveable characters? 
(Warning! As the show South Park itself can be very unpredictable and contain adult content this bot will most likely contain the following :  Drugs, Alcohol, Death, mentions of depression and or other mental illnesses and physical violence)
creator: Babybat666
